overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Watch Dogs: Legion showing a character in a leather trench coat walking through a futuristic London at night. The character walks from the Houses of Parliament past Big Ben onto Westminster Bridge toward the London Eye, with wet streets reflecting neon lights and futuristic drones flying overhead.

events.description: character crosses the street and approaches the entrance to Westminster Bridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet street past Big Ben with the illuminated Parliament buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: black London taxi cab driving past the character on the wet road
person holding an umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: illuminated Gothic clock tower with projected advertisements on its face
historic stone Gothic Revival building with warm orange lighting
ornate Victorian-style street lamp with multiple lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the street beside the Houses of Parliament at night. Big Ben's clock tower dominates the center-right of the frame, illuminated with orange light and digital projections. Black taxis and other vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt, reflecting the city lights.

events.description: character steps onto Westminster Bridge as the London Eye comes into view on the left
character continues walking straight along the bridge as the camera maintains steady follow

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge sidewalk toward the illuminated London Eye

notable_agents.action: person standing by the bridge railing looking out at the river Thames

entered.detail: large illuminated Ferris wheel with red lighting and digital crown projection
ornate stone balustrade with decorative cutouts running along the bridge edge
dark water reflecting the city lights along the south bank

segments.scene_description: Having left Parliament behind, the character walks onto Westminster Bridge. The London Eye appears ahead on the left, glowing red against the night sky. The stone bridge railing runs along the left side with the Thames visible beyond it, while sparse traffic moves along the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: Westminster Bridge approach to South Bank

events.description: red double-decker bus passes by on the road to the right
futuristic digital billboard becomes visible on the right side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge walkway as the London Eye looms larger on the left, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: classic red double-decker bus driving across the bridge away from the camera
woman in yellow pants and dark jacket walking toward the character

entered.detail: futuristic holographic advertisement display with blue neon trim showing product imagery
iconic red London bus with illuminated windows moving along the bridge road

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the South Bank end of Westminster Bridge with the London Eye now dominating the left side of the frame. More pedestrians appear walking in the opposite direction. A red double-decker bus passes by on the right, and a futuristic digital billboard comes into view. The wet pavement continues to reflect the ambient city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic London night, transitioning from the historic architecture of Parliament toward the glowing modern skyline of the South Bank. It begins with the character walking beside the Houses of Parliament, where the orange light and digital projections of Big Ben dominate the frame above wet, reflective asphalt. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts onto Westminster Bridge, leaving the clock tower behind as the red glow of the London Eye emerges on the horizon. The camera then advances toward the end of the bridge, where the environment becomes more crowded with pedestrians and a passing red double-decker bus. Finally, the view expands to reveal a futuristic digital billboard and the towering presence of the London Eye as the character reaches the city's vibrant waterfront.
